nodes.name: dakuten
nodes.context: Dakuten and handakuten transfer to katakana unchanged: カ->ガ, ハ->バ/パ. Same operator, second script — near-free once hiragana marks are owned.

nodes.name: h row
nodes.context: Katakana ハヒフヘホ: the angular twin of the mastered hiragana row — same sounds, second script. Used for foreign loanwords, emphasis, and sound effects. Recall without furigana support.

nodes.name: k row
nodes.context: Katakana カキクケコ: the angular twin of the mastered hiragana row — same sounds, second script. Used for foreign loanwords, emphasis, and sound effects. Recall without furigana support.

nodes.name: m row
nodes.context: Katakana マミムメモ: the angular twin of the mastered hiragana row — same sounds, second script. Used for foreign loanwords, emphasis, and sound effects. Recall without furigana support.

nodes.name: n row
nodes.context: Katakana ナニヌネノ: the angular twin of the mastered hiragana row — same sounds, second script. Used for foreign loanwords, emphasis, and sound effects. Recall without furigana support.

nodes.name: r row
nodes.context: Katakana ラリルレロ: the angular twin of the mastered hiragana row — same sounds, second script. Used for foreign loanwords, emphasis, and sound effects. Recall without furigana support.

nodes.name: s row
nodes.context: Katakana サシスセソ: the angular twin of the mastered hiragana row — same sounds, second script. Used for foreign loanwords, emphasis, and sound effects. Recall without furigana support.

nodes.name: t row
nodes.context: Katakana タチツテト: the angular twin of the mastered hiragana row — same sounds, second script. Used for foreign loanwords, emphasis, and sound effects. Recall without furigana support.

nodes.name: vowels
nodes.context: Katakana アイウエオ: the angular twin of the mastered hiragana row — same sounds, second script. Used for foreign loanwords, emphasis, and sound effects. Recall without furigana support.

nodes.name: w row
nodes.context: Katakana ワヲン: the angular twin of the mastered hiragana row — same sounds, second script. Used for foreign loanwords, emphasis, and sound effects. Recall without furigana support.

nodes.name: y row
nodes.context: Katakana ヤユヨ: the angular twin of the mastered hiragana row — same sounds, second script. Used for foreign loanwords, emphasis, and sound effects. Recall without furigana support.

nodes.name: h row
nodes.context: H-row はひふへほ (fu irregular): recognize each kana from its sound and recall it unprompted. Mastery = sound-to-symbol without romaji support.

nodes.name: k row
nodes.context: K-row かきくけこ: recognize each kana from its sound and recall it unprompted. Mastery = sound-to-symbol without romaji support.

nodes.name: m row
nodes.context: M-row まみむめも: recognize each kana from its sound and recall it unprompted. Mastery = sound-to-symbol without romaji support.

nodes.name: n row
nodes.context: N-row なにぬねの: recognize each kana from its sound and recall it unprompted. Mastery = sound-to-symbol without romaji support.

nodes.name: r row
nodes.context: R-row らりるれろ: recognize each kana from its sound and recall it unprompted. Mastery = sound-to-symbol without romaji support.

nodes.name: s row
nodes.context: S-row さしすせそ (shi irregular romaji): recognize each kana from its sound and recall it unprompted. Mastery = sound-to-symbol without romaji support.

nodes.name: t row
nodes.context: T-row たちつてと (chi/tsu irregular): recognize each kana from its sound and recall it unprompted. Mastery = sound-to-symbol without romaji support.

nodes.name: vowels
nodes.context: Vowel row あいうえお: recognize each kana from its sound and recall it unprompted. Mastery = sound-to-symbol without romaji support.

nodes.name: w row
nodes.context: W-row + ん (わをん): recognize each kana from its sound and recall it unprompted. Mastery = sound-to-symbol without romaji support.

nodes.name: y row
nodes.context: Y-row やゆよ: recognize each kana from its sound and recall it unprompted. Mastery = sound-to-symbol without romaji support.

nodes.name: chouon
nodes.context: Long vowels: in hiragana, doubled vowels (おかあさん) with the ou pattern for long o (がっこう); in katakana, the bar ー (ケーキ). A held beat — hear the length, write the length.

nodes.name: dakuten
nodes.context: Dakuten voicing marks: か->が, さ->ざ, た->だ, は->ば. A transformation on known kana, not new symbols — teach as an operator.

nodes.name: handakuten
nodes.context: Handakuten: は-row + circle -> pa pi pu pe po.

nodes.name: sokuon
nodes.context: Small っ doubles the following consonant (きって kitte). Heard as a beat of silence.

nodes.name: yoon
nodes.context: Contracted sounds: i-column kana + small ゃゅょ (きゃ kya, しゅ shu, ちょ cho). Two symbols, one beat.

nodes.name: animals
nodes.context: Animal words from owned kana: ねこ (cat), いぬ (dog), うし (cow), とり (bird), さかな (fish), うま (horse). Concrete, picturable, high- frequency — production from claimed territory.

nodes.name: first words
nodes.context: Assemble real words from mastered kana (あお, かお, すし). Production from claimed territory; unlocks progressively as rows are mastered.

nodes.name: food
nodes.context: Food words: すし, たこ, おちゃ (tea), ごはん (rice) — plus the sokuon workout きって/きっぷ. Menus become readable; learning leaks into dinner.

nodes.name: greetings
nodes.context: Greetings: こんにちは, おはよう, ありがとう, さようなら. Immediately usable out loud with family — the words that make the learning social.

nodes.name: katakana words
nodes.context: Katakana loanwords hiding English inside: テレビ (TV), ゲーム (game), パン (bread, from Portuguese), ロボット (robot). Decoding these is a magic trick — the word was English all along.

nodes.name: numbers
nodes.context: Numbers one to ten in hiragana: いち, に, さん, し/よん, ご, ろく, しち/なな, はち, きゅう, じゅう. A closed, chantable set — the first complete system owned end to end.
